case_title: CACH, LLC VS. DENNIS S REYES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATIONS OF VENUE & REDUCED FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, DENNIS S AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-30-2013
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-28-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
